heroTitle: Strategy first. Tactics second. Results always.
heroDesc: Most marketing fails because it's tactics without strategy. Build the foundation right and every campaign, every post, every ad becomes 10× more effective.

process.title: Research
process.body: Deep market analysis, competitor audit, customer interviews, and positioning landscape mapping.

process.title: Positioning
process.body: Define your unique market position, messaging hierarchy, and the single most compelling reason to choose you.

process.title: Channel Strategy
process.body: Identify the highest-leverage channels for your audience, stage, and resources. Build a prioritised roadmap.

process.title: Roadmap
process.body: 90-day and 6-month execution plans with specific tactics, owners, budgets, and success metrics.

process.title: Review
process.body: Monthly strategic reviews to track progress, adjust positioning, and ensure tactics remain aligned with strategy.

goodFit.item: Founders launching into a new market or repositioning
CMOs who need a clear strategic framework, not just more tactics
Companies pivoting business model or targeting
Teams who want a documented strategy they can execute independently

badFit.item: Businesses that want tactics without strategy
Teams that won't share data, metrics, or customer insights
Companies not willing to make positioning decisions
Anyone who thinks strategy is a one-time deliverable

ctaHeadline: Ready to build a strategy that actually drives results?
ctaSubtext: Let's define your market position and build an execution plan that compounds.
